visual_description: A man in a grey suit and white shirt sits in the backseat of a car at night, talking on a mobile phone held to his right ear. He looks up and to his left while speaking, with a blurred cityscape visible through the window behind him. Another person is partially visible in the foreground on the right, out of focus.
audio_description: A male voice speaks in Mandarin Chinese in a calm, conversational tone. The background is quiet, with only a faint, low hum from the car's engine or electronics.
